name: HOKUETSU METAL Co., Ltd.
summary: HOKUETSU METAL Co., Ltd. manufactures, processes, and sells iron and steel products in Japan. It offers steel bars for reinforced concrete; rolled steel materials for general structures; rolled steel bars for building structures; and mild steel wires rod and burn-in coils, as well as shaped steel products, such as general and building structural shaped steel, and deformed steel. The company also provides construction/civil engineering materials, including UN, self-drilling, and steel pipe expansion type bolts; UHY hoops and U-CON rings; mechanical fixing hardware; mesh; reinforcing bar assembly processed; fab deck; structural anchor bolts; turnbuckles; TH pieces; and automobile tire chains, as well as bolt metal fittings for various construction and civil engineering. In addition, the company is involved in the manufacture, processing, and sale of machinery and equipment; and collecting, transporting, processing, and selling of general industrial wastes and recycling products, as well as warehousing, and cargo transportation and retrieval businesses. HOKUETSU METAL Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1942 and is headquartered in Nagaoka, Japan.
